race.comment: AJAY VOLSTEAD (12) was good when runner-up behind the mobile last start but will relish the return to a standing start having won his last two attempts under those conditions, overcoming a 20m handicap two back at Albion Park. Starts from 10m further back here but he is two from two at the distance. GOLDEN SUNSET (11) finally returned to the winners' list last time out at Albion Park, coming from this mark to get home by a metre. Has won four of seven tries at this longer distance so could strike again. ZEALOUS SPUR NZ (10) has to come into calculations following back-to-back placings at Albion Park including a second to AJAY VOLSTEAD when off this handicap two back. RAKERO BLAZE NZ (9) won a trial at Menangle before heading north. Proven at this distance and could measure up.
